Source code for src.crud.subscription_plan

"""CRUD and seed for subscription plans and platform billing config."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json

from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from src.config import settings
from src.models.subscription_plan import PlatformBillingConfig, SubscriptionPlan

DEFAULT_INCLUDED_FEATURES = [
    "Unlimited formulas",
    "Inventory in grams / ml",
    "Multi-location support",
    "Team roles & permissions",
    "Customer color history",
    "Cost-per-service tracking",
    "Auto-renewal",
    "Priority email support",
]

DEFAULT_PLANS: list[dict] = [
    {
        "interval": "monthly",
        "title": "Monthly",
        "description": "Flexible billing — cancel anytime.",
        "amount_cents": 2200,
        "period_label": "per month",
        "savings_label": None,
        "features": ["Unlimited formulas", "Cancel anytime", "Auto-renewal"],
        "highlighted": False,
        "sort_order": 0,
    },
    {
        "interval": "biannual",
        "title": "Bi-annual",
        "description": "Best for salons that prefer twice-yearly billing.",
        "amount_cents": 11880,
        "period_label": "every 6 months",
        "savings_label": "Save 10%",
        "features": ["Unlimited formulas", "10% discount", "Auto-renewal"],
        "highlighted": False,
        "sort_order": 1,
    },
    {
        "interval": "annual",
        "title": "Annual",
        "description": "Lowest effective rate for committed teams.",
        "amount_cents": 21120,
        "period_label": "per year",
        "savings_label": "Save 20%",
        "features": ["Unlimited formulas", "20% discount", "Auto-renewal"],
        "highlighted": True,
        "sort_order": 2,
    },
]

STRIPE_ENV_BY_INTERVAL = {
    "monthly": "STRIPE_PRICE_MONTHLY",
    "biannual": "STRIPE_PRICE_BIANNUAL",
    "annual": "STRIPE_PRICE_ANNUAL",
}


def _parse_features(raw: str | None) -> list[str]:
    if not raw:
        return []
    try:
        data = json.loads(raw)
        if isinstance(data, list):
            return [str(x) for x in data]
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
        pass
    return []


def _dump_features(features: list[str]) -> str:
    return json.dumps(features)


def _stripe_price_from_env(interval: str) -> str | None:
    attr = STRIPE_ENV_BY_INTERVAL.get(interval)
    if not attr:
        return None
    value = (getattr(settings, attr, "") or "").strip()
    return value or None




[docs]
def get_billing_config(db: Session) -> PlatformBillingConfig:
    row = db.query(PlatformBillingConfig).filter(PlatformBillingConfig.id == "default").first()
    if row:
        return row
    row = PlatformBillingConfig(
        id="default",
        trial_days=3,
        included_features_json=_dump_features(DEFAULT_INCLUDED_FEATURES),
    )
    db.add(row)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(row)
    return row






[docs]
def update_billing_config(
    db: Session,
    *,
    trial_days: int | None = None,
    included_features: list[str] | None = None,
) -> PlatformBillingConfig:
    row = get_billing_config(db)
    if trial_days is not None:
        row.trial_days = trial_days
    if included_features is not None:
        row.included_features_json = _dump_features(included_features)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(row)
    return row






[docs]
def get_trial_days(db: Session) -> int:
    return get_billing_config(db).trial_days






[docs]
def get_included_features(db: Session) -> list[str]:
    return _parse_features(get_billing_config(db).included_features_json)






[docs]
def list_active_plans(db: Session) -> list[SubscriptionPlan]:
    return (
        db.query(SubscriptionPlan)
        .filter(SubscriptionPlan.active.is_(True))
        .order_by(SubscriptionPlan.sort_order.asc(), SubscriptionPlan.interval.asc())
        .all()
    )






[docs]
def list_all_plans(db: Session) -> list[SubscriptionPlan]:
    return (
        db.query(SubscriptionPlan)
        .order_by(SubscriptionPlan.sort_order.asc(), SubscriptionPlan.interval.asc())
        .all()
    )






[docs]
def get_plan_by_interval(db: Session, interval: str) -> SubscriptionPlan | None:
    return db.query(SubscriptionPlan).filter(SubscriptionPlan.interval == interval).first()






[docs]
def get_active_plan_by_interval(db: Session, interval: str) -> SubscriptionPlan | None:
    return (
        db.query(SubscriptionPlan)
        .filter(SubscriptionPlan.interval == interval, SubscriptionPlan.active.is_(True))
        .first()
    )






[docs]
def get_plan_by_stripe_price_id(db: Session, price_id: str) -> SubscriptionPlan | None:
    if not price_id:
        return None
    return (
        db.query(SubscriptionPlan)
        .filter(SubscriptionPlan.stripe_price_id == price_id, SubscriptionPlan.active.is_(True))
        .first()
    )






[docs]
def update_plan(
    db: Session,
    interval: str,
    *,
    title: str | None = None,
    description: str | None = None,
    amount_cents: int | None = None,
    period_label: str | None = None,
    savings_label: str | None = None,
    features: list[str] | None = None,
    stripe_price_id: str | None = None,
    highlighted: bool | None = None,
    sort_order: int | None = None,
    active: bool | None = None,
) -> SubscriptionPlan | None:
    plan = get_plan_by_interval(db, interval)
    if not plan:
        return None
    if title is not None:
        plan.title = title
    if description is not None:
        plan.description = description
    if amount_cents is not None:
        plan.amount_cents = amount_cents
    if period_label is not None:
        plan.period_label = period_label
    if savings_label is not None:
        plan.savings_label = savings_label or None
    if features is not None:
        plan.features_json = _dump_features(features)
    if stripe_price_id is not None:
        plan.stripe_price_id = stripe_price_id.strip() or None
    if highlighted is not None:
        plan.highlighted = highlighted
    if sort_order is not None:
        plan.sort_order = sort_order
    if active is not None:
        plan.active = active
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(plan)
    return plan






[docs]
def plan_features(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> list[str]:
    return _parse_features(plan.features_json)






[docs]
def plan_price_usd(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> float:
    return round(plan.amount_cents / 100, 2)






[docs]
def plan_price_display(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> str:
    usd = plan_price_usd(plan)
    if plan.interval == "monthly":
        return f"${usd:.0f}"
    return f"${usd:.2f}"






[docs]
def plan_monthly_equivalent(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> float | None:
    usd = plan_price_usd(plan)
    if plan.interval == "monthly":
        return usd
    if plan.interval == "biannual":
        return round(usd / 6, 2)
    if plan.interval == "annual":
        return round(usd / 12, 2)
    return None






[docs]
def plan_to_public(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> dict:
    return {
        "interval": plan.interval,
        "title": plan.title,
        "description": plan.description,
        "price_usd": plan_price_usd(plan),
        "price_display": plan_price_display(plan),
        "period_label": plan.period_label,
        "savings_label": plan.savings_label,
        "features": plan_features(plan),
        "highlighted": plan.highlighted,
        "monthly_equivalent_usd": plan_monthly_equivalent(plan),
    }






[docs]
def plan_to_admin(plan: SubscriptionPlan) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": plan.id,
        "interval": plan.interval,
        "title": plan.title,
        "description": plan.description,
        "amount_cents": plan.amount_cents,
        "currency": plan.currency,
        "period_label": plan.period_label,
        "savings_label": plan.savings_label,
        "features": plan_features(plan),
        "stripe_price_id": plan.stripe_price_id,
        "highlighted": plan.highlighted,
        "sort_order": plan.sort_order,
        "active": plan.active,
        "updated_at": plan.updated_at,
    }






[docs]
def build_public_catalog(db: Session) -> dict:
    config = get_billing_config(db)
    plans = [plan_to_public(p) for p in list_active_plans(db)]
    return {
        "trial_days": config.trial_days,
        "included_features": _parse_features(config.included_features_json),
        "plans": plans,
    }






[docs]
def interval_price_usd(db: Session, interval: str) -> float:
    plan = get_active_plan_by_interval(db, interval)
    if plan:
        return plan_price_usd(plan)
    from src.utils.subscription import interval_price_usd_fallback

    return interval_price_usd_fallback(interval)






[docs]
def price_label_for_interval(db: Session, interval: str) -> str | None:
    plan = get_active_plan_by_interval(db, interval)
    if not plan:
        return None
    usd = plan_price_usd(plan)
    if interval == "monthly":
        return f"${usd:.0f}/month"
    if interval == "biannual":
        return f"${usd:.2f} every 6 months"
    if interval == "annual":
        return f"${usd:.2f}/year"
    return None






[docs]
def stripe_price_id_for_interval(db: Session, interval: str) -> str | None:
    plan = get_active_plan_by_interval(db, interval)
    if plan and plan.stripe_price_id:
        return plan.stripe_price_id.strip()
    return _stripe_price_from_env(interval)






[docs]
def interval_from_stripe_price_id(db: Session, price_id: str | None) -> str | None:
    if not price_id:
        return None
    plan = get_plan_by_stripe_price_id(db, price_id)
    if plan:
        return plan.interval
    for interval in STRIPE_ENV_BY_INTERVAL:
        if _stripe_price_from_env(interval) == price_id:
            return interval
    return None






[docs]
def seed_default_plans(db: Session) -> None:
    get_billing_config(db)
    for item in DEFAULT_PLANS:
        existing = get_plan_by_interval(db, item["interval"])
        env_price = _stripe_price_from_env(item["interval"])
        if existing:
            if env_price and not existing.stripe_price_id:
                existing.stripe_price_id = env_price
            continue
        db.add(
            SubscriptionPlan(
                interval=item["interval"],
                title=item["title"],
                description=item["description"],
                amount_cents=item["amount_cents"],
                period_label=item["period_label"],
                savings_label=item["savings_label"],
                features_json=_dump_features(item["features"]),
                stripe_price_id=env_price,
                highlighted=item["highlighted"],
                sort_order=item["sort_order"],
                active=True,
            )
        )
    db.commit()
